sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n23229" key="daimoniko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δαιμον-ικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, of persons or animals, <sense id="n23229.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">possessed by a demon,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ζῷον</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.362f</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>: of things, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sent by a demon,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">οὐ θεῖον, ἀλλὰ δ.</foreign> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">996c</biblScope></bibl>, cf.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">458c</biblScope> </bibl>; <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δ. δύναμις</foreign> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">363a</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
